userTokenId.description: The unique identifier of the newly created user token.

userToken.description: The generated user token secret. Only available at creation time.

userTokenName.description: The display name of the user token.

clientId.description: The client identifier of the application the token is associated with.

ipsWhitelist.description: The IPv4 addresses from which the token is allowed to be used. Null or empty when unrestricted.

scopeNames.description: The authorized scope names granted to the token.

expiresAt.description: The UTC expiration date of the token. Null when the token does not expire.

createdAt.description: The UTC timestamp at which the token was created.
